headline: Morgan Stanley outlines 5 key themes across the gig economy
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley identified five thematic trends across the gig economy following simultaneous earnings from DoorDash Inc (NASDAQ:DASH), Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER) and Instacart (NASDAQ:CART), while raising its Snap price target 8% to $7.
